title: Roster sync — Coach App → Parent App
goal: Establish the one-way sync pipeline that pushes parent-safe swimmer roster data from BSPC Coach App (Firebase) to BSPC Parent App (Supabase), end-to-end, with one parent-readable mirror table protected by RLS and a Firestore-triggered Cloud Function as the bridge.
non_goals: Notes sync (cycle 3, after note-visibility opt-in flag)
Mapping Coach App swimmers to Supabase families/parent accounts
Replacing or modifying existing Supabase swimmers table
Replacing Coach App's parent-portal Next.js scaffold
New libraries beyond what's already in both repos

lineage.builder: Codex (Cloud or local CLI — TBD at dispatch)

pr_title: [CYCLE BSPC-2026-05-04-001] Roster sync — Coach App → Parent App
rollback_plan: Revert PRs. If migration applied: drop coach_roster_mirror table or write down-migration. Disable Cloud Function via Firebase console if misbehaves.
